chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1617 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For katcha peshi. 28.10.2016. Mr. Javed S. Kumbhar, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w Inspe. Tasawar Hussain Jat SHO Kunri and SIP Panjmal Singh of P.S Chhachro, Mithi = Today, the learned State Counsel has filed statement on behalf of official respondents, wherein they have undertaken that petitioners will be provided protection in accordance with law, if approached by them. Respondent No.3-Ami Muhammad is also present in person and states that he is cousin of petitioner No.1-Mst. Sanam and confirms that parties have settled their dispute amicably. However, petitioner’s Counsel states that still there is some apprehension that private respondents may commit illegal acts. In such an event, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners by discharging their duties in accordance with law. In this regard, copy of this order be provided to the learned State Counsel for compliance and issuing necessary directions. With these observations, the present constitutional petition is disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
